basic_details.job_title: MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026: 492 Registrar, Demonstrator and Resident Physician Posts, Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Medical and Health Recruitment Board (MHRB), Assam
basic_details.department: Medical Education & Research Department, Government of Assam
basic_details.short_information: The Medical and Health Recruitment Board (MHRB), Assam has invited online applications for 492 posts of Registrar, Demonstrator, Resident Physician and similar faculty positions in Government Medical Colleges and Hospitals under the Medical Education & Research Department, Government of Assam. The recruitment covers 32 departments including Anatomy, Medicine, Surgery, Radiology, Orthopaedics, Paediatrics and more. Interested and eligible doctors with the requisite postgraduate qualification and registration under the Assam Council of Medical Registration, Medical Council of India, or National

application_fee.details: The application fee can be paid in either of two ways: | Through Treasury Challan under the Head of Account "0210-Medical and Public Health-01-Urban Health Services-800-Other Receipt", OR Online through the Government Receipt Accounting System (GRAS) at https://assamegras.gov.in. The printed copy of the Treasury Challan generated through GRAS should be submitted at the time of scrutiny of documents, with the applied post mentioned in the Remarks column. | Fees are non-refundable, and no mode of deposit other than Treasury Challan (offline or via GRAS) will be accepted.

age_limit.age_relaxation: 10 years, irrespective of SC/ST/OBC and General Category (as per Govt. Notification No. ABP.144/95/121 dated 28.10.2015)

qualification.details: A Postgraduate qualification of MD/MS/DNB/MDS in the concerned subject from an institute under any Indian University recognised by the National Medical Commission (previously MCI)/National Board of Education (NBE)/Dental Council of India is required for the following departments: Anaesthesiology, Dentistry, Dermatology, ENT, Emergency Medicine, FSM, Medicine, Microbiology, Orthopaedics, Ophthalmology, O&G, Pharmacology, Pathology, Psychiatry, Paediatrics, PM&R, Radiology, Radiation Oncology, Surgery, SPM (Community Medicine), TB & Chest (Pulmonary Medicine), and Nuclear Medicine. | Anatomy Department: Postgraduate qualification MS (Anatomy)/M.Sc (Medical Anatomy) with Ph.D in Medical Anatomy, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. Biochemistry Department: Postgraduate qualification MD (Biochemistry)/M.Sc (Medical Biochemistry) with Ph.D in Medical Biochemistry, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. Physiology Department: Postgraduate qualification MD (Physiology)/M.Sc (Medical Physiology) with Ph.D in Medical Physiology, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. | A Postgraduate qualification MD/DNB in General Medicine is required for Medical Super Specialty departments - Cardiology, Neurology, Endocrinology, Nephrology, Medical Oncology. A Postgraduate qualification MS/DNB in General Surgery is required for Surgical Super Specialty departments - Plastic Surgery, CTVS, Neuro-Surgery, Urology, Paediatric Surgery. Candidates holding DM/M.Ch/DNB in the concerned super specialty subject will be given preference/weightage. | Weightage will be given to doctors working under Rule 17A of MHRB Regulations, or under any contractual engagement at a healthcare institute under the Medical Education & Research Department, including post-PG contractual engagement.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will draw a pay scale of ₹57,700 – ₹1,82,400 per month (Academic Level 10), plus other allowances as admissible under the applicable rules.

selection_process: The selection procedure will be notified later through a separate Notice. The Board will decide the selection procedure for these posts based on the number of applications received.
how_to_apply: Visit the official website: https://nhm.assam.gov.in, then navigate to Recruitment → National Health Mission, Assam New.
Log in using your mobile number and password.
Fill up the online application form for the specific post you wish to apply for.
Ensure the application includes your photograph and signature, as an incomplete form is liable to be summarily rejected.
Pay the applicable application fee via Treasury Challan or online through GRAS.
Review all details carefully before submission - once the form is submitted, no further changes will be applicable.

rows.details: Medical and Health Recruitment Board (MHRB), Assam
Medical Education & Research Department, Government of Assam
Government Medical Colleges & Hospitals under Medical Education & Research Department, Assam

content_sections.heading: MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026: Department-wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 492 posts of Registrar/Demonstrator/Resident Physician are available across the following departments. The table below shows category-wise posts (UR, OBC/MOBC, SC, ST-Plains, ST-Hills), the RFW (Reserved for Women) figure under each category as printed in the notification, the department total, and posts reserved for Persons with Disabilities (PWD). Note: The number of vacancies may vary due to administrative exigencies in due course of time. Category of Disability considered: Orthopedically handicapped with at least one arm and one leg, and low vision. Hearing handicapped and blind candidates may be considered if they can perform the job with aids and appliances.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must have Indian citizenship as mentioned in Articles 5 to 8 of the Constitution of India. Candidates must have the requisite qualification and registration under the Assam Council of Medical Registration, Medical Council of India, or the National Medical Commission. Doctors serving under the Directorate of Medical Education (DME), Directorate of Health Services (DHS), National Health Mission (NHM) Assam, and other Government agencies are eligible to apply, and no separate NOC from the State Government is required for these posts.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: A Postgraduate qualification of MD/MS/DNB/MDS in the concerned subject from an institute under any Indian University recognised by the National Medical Commission (previously MCI)/National Board of Education (NBE)/Dental Council of India is required for the following departments: Anaesthesiology, Dentistry, Dermatology, ENT, Emergency Medicine, FSM, Medicine, Microbiology, Orthopaedics, Ophthalmology, O&G, Pharmacology, Pathology, Psychiatry, Paediatrics, PM&R, Radiology, Radiation Oncology, Surgery, SPM (Community Medicine), TB & Chest (Pulmonary Medicine), and Nuclear Medicine. Anatomy Department: Postgraduate qualification MS (Anatomy)/M.Sc (Medical Anatomy) with Ph.D in Medical Anatomy, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. Biochemistry Department: Postgraduate qualification MD (Biochemistry)/M.Sc (Medical Biochemistry) with Ph.D in Medical Biochemistry, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. Physiology Department: Postgraduate qualification MD (Physiology)/M.Sc (Medical Physiology) with Ph.D in Medical Physiology, as per the latest notification of NMC, New Delhi. A Postgraduate qualification MD/DNB in General Medicine is required for Medical Super Specialty departments - Cardiology, Neurology, Endocrinology, Nephrology, Medical Oncology. A Postgraduate qualification MS/DNB in General Surgery is required for Surgical Super Specialty departments - Plastic Surgery, CTVS, Neuro-Surgery, Urology, Paediatric Surgery. Candidates holding DM/M.Ch/DNB in the concerned super specialty subject will be given preference/weightage. Weightage will be given to doctors working under Rule 17A of MHRB Regulations, or under any contractual engagement at a healthcare institute under the Medical Education & Research Department, including post-PG contractual engagement.

rows.detail: As on 01.01.2026, irrespective of category (as per Govt. OM No. ABP.55/2023/25 dated 04.07.2023)
10 years, irrespective of SC/ST/OBC and General Category (as per Govt. Notification No. ABP.144/95/121 dated 28.10.2015)

content_sections.heading: Pay Scale / Salary
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will draw a pay scale of ₹57,700 – ₹1,82,400 per month (Academic Level 10), plus other allowances as admissible under the applicable rules.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee can be paid in either of two ways: Through Treasury Challan under the Head of Account "0210-Medical and Public Health-01-Urban Health Services-800-Other Receipt", OR Online through the Government Receipt Accounting System (GRAS) at https://assamegras.gov.in . The printed copy of the Treasury Challan generated through GRAS should be submitted at the time of scrutiny of documents, with the applied post mentioned in the Remarks column. Fees are non-refundable, and no mode of deposit other than Treasury Challan (offline or via GRAS) will be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection procedure will be notified later through a separate Notice. The Board will decide the selection procedure for these posts based on the number of applications received.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates need not submit any testimonials or certificates at the time of online application submission. However, the following original documents (with self-attested copies) must be produced at the time of interview: Educational qualification certificates Date of birth proof Caste certificate (if applicable) PWD certificate (if applicable) Treasury Challan / GRAS payment receipt Working experience certificate(s), if applicable

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: https://nhm.assam.gov.in , then navigate to Recruitment → National Health Mission, Assam New . Log in using your mobile number and password. Fill up the online application form for the specific post you wish to apply for. Ensure the application includes your photograph and signature, as an incomplete form is liable to be summarily rejected. Pay the applicable application fee via Treasury Challan or online through GRAS. Review all details carefully before submission - once the form is submitted, no further changes will be applicable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of online application is 28 July 2026. The application portal will be active from 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 492 total vacancies for Registrar/Demonstrator/Resident Physician posts across 32 departments, though the notification states the number of vacancies may vary due to administrative exigencies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹250 for General/UR candidates and ₹150 for OBC/MOBC/SC/ST(P)/ST(H) candidates. There is no fee for candidates with a valid PWD certificate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MHRB Assam Registrar/Demonstrator/Resident Physician recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not less than 21 years and not more than 45 years of age as on 01.01.2026, irrespective of category. PWD candidates get a 10-year age relaxation irrespective of category.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates generally need a postgraduate medical qualification (MD/MS/DNB/MDS) in the concerned subject recognised by the National Medical Commission, NBE, or Dental Council of India. Specific departments like Anatomy, Biochemistry, and Physiology have distinct qualification requirements, and Super Specialty posts require DM/M.Ch/DNB qualifications, as detailed in the Educational Qualification section above.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for MHRB Assam Registrar/Demonstrator/Resident Physician posts?
faq.answer: The pay scale is ₹57,700 – ₹1,82,400 per month (Academic Level 10), plus other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. Can doctors already serving under DME/DHS/NHM Assam apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. Doctors serving under DME, DHS, NHM Assam, or other Government agencies are eligible to apply, and no separate NOC from the State Government is required.

faq.question: Q8. How can I pay the MHRB Assam application fee?
faq.answer: The fee can be paid either through a Treasury Challan under the specified Head of Account, or online through the Government Receipt Accounting System (GRAS) at assamegras.gov.in. No other mode of payment is accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Can I make changes to my application after submitting it?
faq.answer: No. Once the online application form is submitted, no further changes will be applicable, so candidates should review all details carefully before final submission.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for MHRB Assam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection procedure has not yet been notified. The Board will decide and announce the selection procedure separately, based on the number of applications received.
